data.title: Clearwater Paper Corp reports 2025 full year results: Net sales $1.6B (up 12% from 2024), net loss $53M.
data.description: In Spokane, Washington, Clearwater Paper Corporation (NYSE: CLW), a leading supplier of bleached paperboard to North American converters, announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. Throughout 2025, the company achieved significant milestones, including a 12% increase in net sales totaling $1.6 billion compared to the previous year. This growth in sales was driven by a 14% rise in volumes, primarily attributed to the full-year operation of the Augusta facility. However, the company reported a net loss from continuing operations amounting to $53 million, equivalent to $3.28 per diluted share.

data.title: Edison to cut exec bonuses due to Eaton Fire; Equipment likely caused blaze destroying Altadena in LA.
data.description: The wildfire that ravaged a significant portion of Altadena, a suburb of Los Angeles, was most likely initiated by Southern California Edison's electrical equipment. The blaze resulted in extensive destruction in the area.

data.title: DoorDash (NASDAQ: DASH) Q4 earnings missed estimates by -17.24%, with EPS of $0.48 vs $0.58. Revenue up $1.08B YoY.

The report revealed that the company fell short of estimated earnings by -17.24%, reporting an EPS of $0.48 compared to the expected $0.58. Revenue saw a significant increase of $1.08 billion from the prior year's Q4. In the previous quarter, DoorDash... (the rest of the information is available on a specific platform).

data.title: eBay beats Q4 earnings with EPS of $1.41 (estimated $1.24), revenue up by $386.00 million from last year.
data.description: In its recent Q4 earnings report released on February 18, 2026, eBay (NASDAQ: EBAY) revealed impressive financial results. The company surpassed expected earnings by an impressive 13.71%, posting an EPS of $1.41 compared to the estimated $1.24. Revenue also saw a significant increase, rising by $386.00 million from the corresponding period the previous year. eBay has a history of outperforming earnings estimates, surpassing EPS expectations by $0.12 in the latest quarter. For further details, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Herbalife (NYSE: HLF) reports Q4 and full-year net sales growth, adjusted EBITDA above guidance for year ending Dec 2025. Ronaldo invests in Pro2col.
data.description: Los Angeles based Herbalife Ltd. (NYSE: HLF) released their financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025. The company reported that they concluded 2025 on a positive note, surpassing guidance with growth in net sales and adjusted EBITDA1. The company's collaboration with Cristiano Ronaldo on Pro2col signifies a joint focus on expanding personalized nutrition and wellness worldwide by leveraging science, data, AI, innovation, and community to enhance the health and performance of countless individuals.

data.title: Cristiano Ronaldo invests $7.5 million in Herbalife's Pro2col™ tech, acquires 10% stake; aims to boost wellness engagement.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Herbalife Ltd. shared that global sports figure Cristiano Ronaldo has obtained a 10% equity stake in HBL Pro2col Software, LLC, a subsidiary of Herbalife holding the Pro2col technology. This innovative system is Herbalife's advanced digital health and wellness platform, aiming to enhance engagement and foster lasting behavior modifications. Cristiano Ronaldo's investment marked a significant milestone in Herbalife's pursuit of promoting health and wellness globally.

data.title: Brookdale Senior Living Inc. reported full-year 2025 results, including a net loss of $263 million and Adjusted EBITDA of $458 million, while achieving a 5.7% increase in consolidated revenue per available unit. Occupancy rates also saw a significant improvement, with a 310 basis point increase in the fourth quarter of 2025. The company refinanced $350 million in remaining 2026 mortgage debt and $200 million of 2027 debt.CEO Nick Stengle expressed optimism for 2026, expecting mid-teens growth in Adjusted EBITDA and 8-9% RevPAR growth.
data.description: Brookdale Senior Living Inc. reported its financial results for the quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025. Highlights include a 5.7% increase in consolidated revenue per available unit (RevPAR), with a 310 basis points improvement in occupancy in the fourth quarter of 2025 compared to the prior year. The net loss for the full year 2025 was $263 million, and Adjusted EBITDA was $458 million, surpassing the company's guidance. They successfully refinanced all remaining 2026 and a portion of 2027 mortgage debt, enhancing their balance sheet. The CEO cited positive momentum in 2025 and anticipates further growth in 2026 with mid-teens year-over-year growth in Adjusted EBITDA and 8-9% RevPAR growth. The fourth quarter saw a 7.1% increase in RevPAR and a 250 basis points growth in occupancy. The same community portfolio showed a 5.0% increase in RevPAR and a 250 basis point growth in occupancy. Year-over-year, the company saw a 5.7% increase in RevPAR and a 230 basis point growth in average occupancy. Operating expenses and net loss decreased, while Adjusted EBITDA improved. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com for more details.

data.title: Tronox reports $730M revenue, $114M Q4 loss, $2,898M full year revenue, $253M loss, aiming for positive free cash flow in 2026.
data.description: Tronox Holdings plc reported financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 and the full year. In Q4 2025, they had revenues of $730 million, a loss from operations of $114 million, and a net loss of $176 million. For the full year 2025, revenues were $2,898 million, with a loss from operations of $253 million and a net loss of $470 million. Adjusted EBITDA for Q4 was $57 million with a margin of 7.8%, and for the full year was $336 million with a margin of 11.6%. Tronox expects to generate positive free cash flow in 2026, with Q1 2026 adjusted EBITDA expected to be $55-$65 million. They have made significant improvements in their cost structures, safety performance, and liquidity. The company focuses on improving cash generation, efficiency, and reducing inventory levels for 2026. Investors can access a webcast conference call on February 19, 2026, for more information. Information on their financial status, operational performance, and outlook for 2026 is detailed.

data.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. announced Q4 2025 results: GAAP net income $208.7M, Book value/share $18.63, portfolio $20.0B, liquidity $1.2B.
data.description: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. reported unaudited Q4 results for 2025 with GAAP net income of $208.7 million and distributable earnings of $79.8 million. The average interest income on assets was 4.97%, and interest cost on liabilities was 4.27%, resulting in an economic net interest spread of 1.77%. The company raised $3.8 million through preferred stock issuance and paid common stock dividends of $0.72 per share for Q4. The financial position as of December 31, 2025, showed a book value per common share of $18.63, a total economic return of 10.63% for Q4, and liquidity of $1.2 billion. The portfolio included $20.0 billion in assets, and debt to equity ratio stood at 7.94:1. Management cited a successful year in deploying capital and adjusting hedges for risk management. Stock outstanding included 119.4 million common shares and 7.3 million preferred shares. Liquidity surpassed $1.0 billion, excluding MBS principal and interest receivable. The balance sheet showed assets totaling $21.0 billion, including cash, Agency Securities, U.S. Treasury Securities, and derivatives, with liabilities including repurchase agreements. Overall, 2025 was a good year for ARMOUR with total economic returns of 12.79%, strong capital raising, and strategic growth in the investment portfolio.

data.title: O-I Glass to present at BofA Securities 2026 Global Agriculture and Materials Conference on Feb. 25, 2026.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, in Perrysburg, Ohio, O-I Glass, Inc. informed that it will partake in the BofA Securities 2026 Global Agriculture and Materials Conference on February 25, 2026.

data.title: Carvana reports record growth in Q4 and FY 2025, growing 43% YOY. More details in shareholder letter.
data.description: Carvana, a prominent e-commerce platform specializing in car sales, reported its financial performance for the full year and quarter ending on December 31, 2025. The company highlighted a significant 43% growth compared to the previous year and achieved record-breaking unit economics during this period. Detailed financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025, along with management insights, can be found in the shareholder letter located on Carvana's Investor Relations website.

data.title: Ceribell to present at Raymond James conference on March 2 at 1pm PST and TD Cowen conference on March 3 at 10:50am PST.
data.description: A Sunnyvale-based medical technology company, CeriBell, Inc. (Nasdaq: CBLL), is set to attend two investor conferences in the coming weeks. The company, known for its focus on revolutionizing the diagnosis and treatment of patients with serious neurological disorders, will have CFO Scott Blumberg present at the Raymond James 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference on March 2, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PST / 4:00 p.m. EST. Additionally, CEO and Co-founder Jane Chao, Ph.D., along with CFO Scott Blumberg, will engage in a fireside chat at the TD Cowen 46th Annual Health Care Conference on March 3, 2026, at 10:50 a.m. PST / 1:50 p.m. EST.

data.title: Carlsmed introduces corra™ Cervical Plating System, part of patient-specific fixation portfolio, for personalized procedures.
data.description: Carlsmed introduces the innovative corra™ Cervical Plating System as part of their personalized fixation lineup. This marks the debut of Carlsmed's patient-specific fixation portfolio.

data.title: CNB Bank in Clearfield, PA, becomes state member bank of Federal Reserve Bank of Philadelphia on Feb 12,2026.
data.description: CNB Financial Corporation disclosed today that its wholly-owned banking subsidiary, CNB Bank, has transitioned into a state member bank overseen by the Federal Reserve System's Board of Governors via the Federal Reserve Bank of Philadelphia as of February 12, 2026. CNB Bank will remain under the regulatory purview of the Pennsylvania Department of Banking and Securities. The parent company, CNB Financial Corporation, operates under the ticker symbol CCNE on the NASDAQ stock exchange.

data.title: CRH reports Q4 and FY 2025 results: $37.4B in total revenues (5% increase YoY) and $3.8B in net income (8% increase YoY).
data.description: CRH, a major supplier of building materials and listed on NYSE as CRH, announced its financial results for Q4 and full year 2025. In 2025, the company recorded total revenues of $37.4 billion, showing a 5% increase from $35.6 billion in 2024. This growth was primarily due to robust end-market demand, effective commercial strategies, and input from acquisitions. Net income for 2025 stood at $3.8 billion, marking an 8% rise from $3.5 billion in 2024. This growth underscores the company's solid operational performance during the year.

data.title: Farmland Partners Inc. reported net income of $32.2 million in 2025, compared to $61.5 million in 2024. AFFO was $17.9 million.
data.description: Farmland Partners Inc. (NYSE: FPI) announced their financial results for the year ending December 31, 2025. The company reported a net income of $32.2 million, which translates to $0.65 per share for common stockholders. This is a decrease from the previous year when they reported a net income of $61.5 million, or $1.19 per share for common stockholders in 2024. Additionally, their Adjusted Funds From Operations (AFFO) for 2025 were $17.9 million, or $0.39 per share, compared to $14.1 million in the previous year.

data.title: Peakstone Realty Trust released Q4 and full year 2025 results, focusing on industrial outdoor storage sector.
data.description: Peakstone Realty Trust, a leading industrial real estate investment trust specializing in industrial outdoor storage, revealed its financial performance for the quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025. The company, traded on NYSE as PKST, is moving forward with a proposed merger. On February 2, 2026, Peakstone and its operating partnership, PKST OP L.P., agreed to merge under an Agreement and Plan of Merger. This strategic move signifies significant developments in the company's growth and future prospects.

data.title: eBay acquires Depop, a trending Gen Z secondhand clothing app, from Etsy.
data.description: An investigation revealed that over 500,000 patient records were accessed by hackers in a recent cyber attack on a major healthcare provider. The hackers were able to obtain personal information, including names, addresses, and Social Security numbers. This breach has raised concerns about the security of sensitive data in healthcare organizations. The healthcare provider is working with cybersecurity experts to enhance their security measures and protect against future attacks.

MONDELEZ ENTERED A NEW $1.5 BILLION REVOLVING CREDIT AGREEMENT, TERMINATED ITS 2025 $1.5 BILLION FACILITY, AND SECURED AN OPTION TO EXPAND THE NEW LINE BY UP TO $500 MILLION, ACCORDING TO AN SEC FILING.
